operator_summary: Proved autonomy improvement `pack-local-operator-hint-briefing` from `json-health-checker-hint-briefing-build-pack-v1`. Adopted surfaces: factory_root_discoverability, factory_root_memory, materializer_defaults. Pending surfaces: source_template_tracking.
summary: Promote pack-local startup guidance that surfaces readiness operator_hint_status during build-pack entry and continuation.

notes: This captures whether a fresh factory-root agent can discover the improvement without entering a pack.
This captures whether the improvement is reflected in the factory's own restart-memory handoff.
This is the main automatic inheritance path for future build-packs.
When an autonomy improvement lands here, newly materialized build-packs receive it by default.
This records whether the source template itself has been updated to describe or carry the improvement.
Pending here means the improvement may still be inherited through factory tooling without being reflected directly in the template source.
